name: Carrot Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, blend the oil and sugars on low until well mixed.
2. Add vanilla and beat in eggs one at a time, blending well after each addition.
3. Stir together dry ingredients and add to egg mixture until well blended.
4. Stir in walnuts and shredded carrots by hand.
5. Pour batter into a greased and floured 10-inch tube pan or fluted pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 50-60 minutes.
7. Cool in the pan, then top with powdered sugar or frosting of your choice.
